name: save_memory
description: Persist a key fact, insight, or context entry to the memory file (Consciousness.md or a dedicated memory store). Use this to save information that needs to survive across sessions or be shared with other agents.

key.description: A short, descriptive key identifying this memory entry (e.g., 'api_endpoint_base_url', 'current_sprint_goal').

value.description: The value or content to store. Keep under 200 words for effective context sharing.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for this entry: 'session' (current session only), '24h', '7d', '30d', or 'persistent'. Defaults to '7d'.

target_file.description: Path to the memory file. Defaults to 'Consciousness.md'.
